title: cyathea tenggerensis
intro: Cyathea tenggerensis, also known as the Tengger fern or East Java tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the tropical forests of Indonesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyathea tenggerensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
